name: Salmon Spread Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin and bones from the smoked salmon.
2. Flake the fish into small pieces.
3. In a bowl, mix together the minced onion, garlic, celery, mustard, sweet pickle, mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped parsley until well combined.
4. Chill the mixture for at least one hour before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
